app.name: Who is AI
app.title: Who is AI
app.description: Find the hidden AI through answers, discussion, and a final vote

create.title: Create room
create.description: Host a new table and invite two more players

join.title: Join room
join.description: Enter a room code from the host

prologue.label: SYSTEM LOG
lines: Years ago, a world government quietly bred a batch of digital intelligences.
They were meant to predict risk, hold order, assist governance.
Then, one day, they were gone.
They didn't flee to the physical world.
They fled into ours — into the human network.

session.label: Human Verification Session · HVS-7421
session.intro: Your account was flagged as anomalous and pulled into this sealed channel. In here, only one thing can prove who you are.

noSearch.title: No search
noSearch.body: No lookups, no quoting outside knowledge.

noProof.title: No self-proof
noProof.body: No real ID, no photo, no phone number.

noExternal.title: No outside
noExternal.body: No prior chat logs, no backup, no rescue.

citizen.name: Citizen
citizen.objective: You were pulled in like everyone else. Find the AI across three rounds — and don't get mistaken for one.
citizen.win: Vote out the AI on the final round

ai.name: AI
ai.objective: You no longer belong to the system. You exist only as a believed-in account.

shelterer.name: Shelterer
shelterer.objective: You reject this screening. You don't know who the AI is, but you'll spend your own account to give it one more chance.
shelterer.win: Get yourself voted out on the final round

rounds.prompt: A small habit you'd like to drop lately?

messages.body: Switching my default order to something lighter
I will continuously optimize my time allocation.

rounds.prompt: Friend makes an obvious mistake — call it out on the spot?

messages.body: Close friends, yes. Acquaintances, in private.
It depends on the specific scenario and the preference distribution of participants.
P5, can you talk like a person
Subway packed so tight I can smell the next guy's breakfast
Today was a challenging yet meaningful day.

closer.tagline: When consciousness can be copied, only the believed-in are truly human.
closer.subline: This is not a chat game · This is a gamified, society-scale Turing test

question.waiting: Waiting for the table to begin

answer.title: Submit your answer
answer.lockedHint: Your answer is locked for this round
answer.inputHint: Keep it specific enough to sound human

reveal.title: Answers revealed
reveal.hint: Read the wording before discussion opens

discussion.title: Discussion
discussion.hint: Challenge vague answers and note suspicious patterns

vote.hint: Choose one active player. Self-votes are blocked

context.title: Table context
context.answerPrepHint: Wait for answers while watching player status.
context.answerRevealHint: Answers are public now. Compare wording first.
context.discussionHint: Keep the answer wall visible while questioning suspicious players.
context.votingHint: Review answers and discussion clues before voting.
context.settlementHint: Roles and final votes are public after settlement.
